```json [{"bbox": [68, 66, 126, 90], "category": "figure", "text": ""}, {"bbox": [813, 66, 930, 96], "category": "header", "text": "STUSB4500\nPin description"}, {"bbox": [67, 120, 305, 135], "category": "title", "text": "2.2.4 I²C interface pins"}, {"bbox": [443, 156, 651, 170], "category": "table_caption", "text": "Table 3. I²C interface pin list"}, {"bbox": [164, 176, 927, 271], "category": "table", "text": "
NameDescription
SCLI²C clock, need external pull-up
SDAI²C data, need external pull-up
ALERTI²C interrupt, need external pull-up
ADDR0, ADDR1I²C device address bits (see Section 4 I²C Interface)
"}, {"bbox": [164, 289, 273, 302], "category": "text", "text": "• Warning:"}, {"bbox": [206, 306, 889, 320], "category": "text", "text": "– ADDR0 and ADDR1 pins must be connected to ground when there is no connection to an MCU"}, {"bbox": [206, 322, 722, 336], "category": "text", "text": "– SCL and SDA are pulled down when none of VDD or VSYS is present"}, {"bbox": [67, 351, 222, 366], "category": "title", "text": "2.2.5 DISCH"}, {"bbox": [161, 369, 920, 396], "category": "text", "text": "This input/output pin can be used to implement a discharge path for highly capacitive $V_{BUS}$ line on power system side."}, {"bbox": [161, 400, 925, 426], "category": "text", "text": "When used as input, the discharge is internal and a serial resistor must be connected to the pin to limit the discharge current through the pin. Maximum discharge current is 500 mA."}, {"bbox": [161, 428, 875, 457], "category": "text", "text": "The pin can be also used as an open drain output to control an external $V_{BUS}$ discharge path when higher discharge current is required by the application, for instance."}, {"bbox": [161, 458, 896, 499], "category": "text", "text": "The pin is activated at the same time as the internal discharge path on VBUS_VS_DISCH pin. The discharge is activated automatically during cable disconnection, transition to a lower PDO voltage, hard reset and error recovery state. The discharge time is programmable by NVM (see Section 5 Start-up configuration)."}, {"bbox": [67, 514, 207, 528], "category": "title", "text": "2.2.6 GND"}, {"bbox": [163, 531, 223, 544], "category": "text", "text": "Ground."}, {"bbox": [67, 560, 236, 575], "category": "title", "text": "2.2.7 ATTACH"}, {"bbox": [161, 578, 915, 605], "category": "text", "text": "This pin is asserted when a valid source-to-sink connection is established. It is also asserted when a connection to a debug accessory device is detected."}, {"bbox": [69, 973, 164, 984], "category": "footer", "text": "DS12499 - Rev 8"}, {"bbox": [873, 974, 930, 985], "category": "footer", "text": "page 6/42"}] ```
